// reporters: Tier2InheritanceBaseDecl.java.txt#Base.report
package com.consumer.inherit;

// Fail-closed default: Derived inherits report(...) from Base but does not
// declare it itself, so the enclosing-type walk (own declared methods only)
// never finds it - the bare call to an inherited declared method swallows.
class Derived extends Base {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            report(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
